title: Add integration tests for auth-protected API routes
description: All routes specified in the acceptance criteria (/api/notes, /api/enroll, /api/gradebook/*) already use the withAuth HOC which extracts Bearer tokens and returns 401 for missing/invalid/expired tokens. The remaining work is adding integration tests in tests/int/ verifying: (1) calling a protected endpoint without a token returns 401, (2) calling with a valid token returns 200, (3) calling with an expired or invalid token returns 401. Integration test file should follow the vitest config pattern (tests/int/**/*.int.spec.ts).
existing_patterns: src/auth/withAuth.ts — withAuth HOC wraps route handlers with JWT verification, Bearer token extraction via extractBearerToken, and RBAC via checkRole
vitest.config.mts — tests/int/**/*.int.spec.ts is the designated integration test path pattern
src/app/api/notes/route.ts — example of withAuth used on GET (optional) and POST (roles: ['admin','editor'])
src/app/api/gradebook/course/[id]/route.ts — withAuth with roles: ['editor','admin'] on a parameterized route
src/auth/_auth.ts — extractBearerToken and checkRole utilities re-exported from withAuth.ts
